description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a distinctive blue, denim-like textured finish covering the majority of its exterior, including the slide, frame, and grip. The slide features angular serrations at the rear for improved handling and a pair of raised iron sights, both front and rear, in black. The grip is ergonomically contoured with visible panel lines and subtle texturing, providing a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth lower edge and a slight undercut for finger placement. The magazine base is black, slightly extended, and beveled, contrasting with the blue body. No visible manufacturer markings, serial numbers, or model designations are present on the slide or frame, giving the handgun a clean, modern appearance.
description: A modern, blue-textured semi-automatic handgun with black accents, ergonomic grip, and angular slide serrations. The design is sleek and minimalistic, lacking visible markings.
description_view_0: The muzzle end of the handgun, showing the circular barrel opening, front sight, and the blue textured slide with black accents.
description_view_1: The left profile of the handgun, highlighting the blue denim-like finish, angular slide serrations, ergonomic grip, and black magazine base.
description_view_2: The rear view of the handgun, displaying the back of the slide, rear sight, and the contoured grip with visible panel lines.
description_view_3: The right profile of the handgun, mirroring the left side with blue texturing, slide serrations, and ergonomic grip details.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the palm, featuring a blue denim-like textured surface that enhances traction. Subtle panel lines and geometric patterns are visible, providing both visual interest and additional grip. The lower portion of the grip is slightly flared for improved control, and the backstrap appears gently arched. No logos or finger grooves are present, giving the grip a clean, modern look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth lower edge and a slight undercut at the rear for comfortable finger placement. It is of medium thickness, providing structural strength without appearing bulky. The surface is smooth, matching the blue textured finish of the frame, and lacks any additional texturing or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a circular profile visible at the muzzle. It is not threaded, ported, or fluted, and no compensators or suppressor threads are present. The exterior finish matches the blue slide, and no markings or special features are visible on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, caliber designations, or decorative engravings on the slide. The only visual features are the angular serrations at the rear, which are functional and add a modern aesthetic.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is black, slightly extended, and beveled, providing a subtle contrast to the blue grip. It is flat with a gentle outward flare at the rear, aiding in magazine removal. No finger rests, logos, or additional texturing are visible on the magazine base.
